name: UNO Show 'Em No Mercy
description: UNO Show 'Em No Mercy is Mattel's vicious take on the classic — same color-and-number play, but the special cards have been weaponized: Draw 5, Wild Draw 10, brutal stacking +2s and +4s, and a stack of Skip-Everyone wilds. You start with seven cards but routinely end up holding twenty, hand size ballooning every round. The wholesome family-game-night version of UNO this is not.
